heading: Today
text: Morning sun south of the White Mountains, and eastern VT south of Rt. 2, then periods of clouds. Scattered snow showers over the higher terrain north, a dusting in places. Flurries in northern valleys and southern mountains. Highs only in the 30s to near 40 north, 40 to 45 south. Winds northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clearing this evening, then mostly clear and cold. Lows in the mid teens to low 20s, dipping to the low teens in the cold spots. Winds west near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sunshine, mixing with mid and high-level clouds. Highs in the 40s north, near 50 south. Winds light, becoming south less than 10 mph.
